name: Summon Elemental

components.materialDescription: air, a pebble, ash, and water inside a gilded cube worth 400+ GP

placementEligibility.notes: Summon Elemental manifests the Elemental Spirit in an unoccupied space the caster can see within range.

effects.description: Summon one Elemental Spirit in a visible unoccupied space within 90 feet for up to 1 hour with concentration, choosing an Air, Earth, Fire, or Water element. The spirit is an ally, shares your Initiative count but acts immediately after you, obeys verbal commands with no action required, Dodges and avoids danger when uncommanded, disappears at 0 Hit Points or when the spell ends, and uses the slot level for AC, Hit Points, movement, and Slam damage.

scaling.customFormula: Use the slot level as the spell's level in the Elemental Spirit stat block: AC is 11 + spell level, HP is 50 + 10 for each spell level above 4, and Slam damage is 1d10 + 4 + spell level of the element's damage type.

conditionalEndings.description: The elemental spirit disappears when it drops to 0 Hit Points.

summon.objectDescription: Elemental Spirit ally that shares the caster's initiative, acts immediately after the caster, obeys verbal commands with no caster action, and uses Slam as its combat action.

specialActions.name: Slam
specialActions.description: Melee spell attack, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1d10 + 4 + the spell's level damage of the element's type (Bludgeoning for Air/Earth/Water, Fire for Fire), with the element's movement trait applied.

socialEffect.notes: The summoned Elemental Spirit is an ally to the caster and allies, understands the caster languages, shares initiative, and follows commands.

aiContext.prompt: Choose the Elemental Spirit element (Air, Earth, Fire, or Water) and arrival space; use the caster's spell attack modifier for Slam, apply the element's damage type, and grant the element's movement trait.

options.label: Air
options.summary: Summon an Air Elemental Spirit with a flying speed and a Bludgeoning Slam.
options.notes: The summoned creature uses the Elemental Spirit stat block and slot-level scaling.

options.label: Earth
options.summary: Summon an Earth Elemental Spirit with a burrow speed and a Bludgeoning Slam.
options.notes: The summoned creature uses the Elemental Spirit stat block and slot-level scaling.

options.label: Fire
options.summary: Summon a Fire Elemental Spirit whose Slam deals Fire damage.
options.notes: The summoned creature uses the Elemental Spirit stat block and slot-level scaling.

options.label: Water
options.summary: Summon a Water Elemental Spirit with a swim speed and a Bludgeoning Slam.
options.notes: The summoned creature uses the Elemental Spirit stat block and slot-level scaling.

modeChoice.notes: The element choice selects the Elemental Spirit's damage type and movement trait.

description: You call forth an elemental spirit. It manifests in an unoccupied space that you can see within range and uses the Elemental Spirit stat block. When you cast the spell, choose an element: Air, Earth, Fire, or Water. The creature disappears when it drops to 0 Hit Points or when the spell ends. The creature is an ally to you and your allies. In combat, the creature shares your Initiative count, but it takes its turn immediately after yours. It obeys your verbal commands (no action required by you). If you don't issue any, it takes the Dodge action and uses its movement to avoid danger.
higherLevels: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. Use the spell slot's level for the spell's level in the stat block. The Elemental Spirit's Hit Points and Slam damage increase as the spell's level increases.
